swatchbook-storybook.description: Storybook MCP server for swatchbook. Only reachable while `pnpm dev` (turbo run storybook) is running.

swatchbook.description: swatchbook-mcp — DTCG project introspection (tokens, axes, aliases, diagnostics) backed by the apps/storybook config. Requires packages/mcp to be built (pnpm -r build).
